name: ProxyLogon MSExchange OabVirtualDirectory
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: ProxyLogon MSExchange OabVirtualDirectory
SIGMA Description: Detects specific patterns found after a successful ProxyLogon exploitation in relation to a Commandlet invocation of Set-OabVirtualDirectory

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%oabvirtualdirectory%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -externalurl %') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%eval(request%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://f/ AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY ProxyLogon MSExchange OabVirtualDirectory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%oabvirtualdirectory%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '% -externalurl %') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%eval(request%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%http://f/ AQL filter query
